subject: refactor(dashboard): Phase 4a — drawers to DaisyUI drawer component
body:
Replaces the three custom slide-over panes (filter sidebar, detail
pane, settings pane) with DaisyUI's native `drawer` component.
Positioning, slide animation, overlay rendering, and click-outside-
to-close are all handled by DaisyUI CSS + native `<input type="checkbox">`
state synced to React via controlled onChange.

App.jsx rewritten to nest three drawer wrappers:
  - Outer: `drawer lg:drawer-open` for FilterSidebar (left side,
    inline on lg+, overlay below lg)
  - Middle: `drawer drawer-end` for DetailPane (right side slide-over)
  - Inner: `drawer drawer-end` for SettingsPane (right side slide-over)
  - Innermost content wraps Header + TabBar + the main tab router

Each drawer input is controlled:
  checked={state.xxxOpen}
  onChange={e => dispatch({ type: e.target.checked ? 'OPEN_XXX' : 'CLOSE_XXX' })}

The `drawer-overlay` label[htmlFor] handles click-outside-to-close
without any JS — DaisyUI's drawer-side component generates the
backdrop as a sibling label that unchecks the checkbox when clicked.

FilterSidebar.jsx simplified:
  - Dropped the wrapper div + mobile overlay sibling
  - Now renders only the inner content as an `<aside className="menu
    bg-base-200 min-h-full w-80 p-4 space-y-4">` which lives inside
    the drawer-side in App.jsx

DetailPane.jsx simplified:
  - Dropped `.detail-pane-overlay` sibling and `.detail-pane` wrapper
  - Now renders as `flex flex-col h-full w-full max-w-lg bg-base-200
    border-l border-base-300`
  - DaisyUI drawer-end provides the transform/slide animation
  - useFocusTrap + useEscapeKey hooks still run for keyboard UX

SettingsPane.jsx simplified:
  - Same pattern as DetailPane — bare content inside drawer-side
  - Max width w-sm for the narrower settings panel

AppContext new actions:
  - OPEN_FILTER_SIDEBAR: sets filterSidebarOpen = true
  - OPEN_SETTINGS_PANE: sets settingsPaneOpen = true
  These complement the existing TOGGLE_/CLOSE_ actions so the drawer
  onChange can explicitly open (e.target.checked) without flipping
  current state.

styles.css deletions (10+ CSS rules):
  - .detail-pane + .detail-pane.open + mobile bottom-sheet @media
  - .detail-pane-overlay + .detail-pane-overlay.open
  - .detail-pane-header::before (mobile drag handle pseudo)
  - .settings-pane + .settings-pane.open + mobile bottom-sheet @media
  - .settings-pane-overlay + .settings-pane-overlay.open
  - .settings-pane-header::before (mobile drag handle pseudo)
  - .filter-sidebar + .filter-sidebar.open + .filter-sidebar.collapsed
  - .filter-sidebar-overlay + .filter-sidebar-overlay.open
  - @media (max-width: 768px) .filter-sidebar transforms block
  - .dashboard-enter + @keyframes dashboard-enter (page-load fade-in
    animation — vanilla sweep removes cosmetic entrance animations)

Tests (daisyui-surfaces.test.mjs):
  - LEGITIMATE_CUSTOM_CLASSES allowlist: removed filter-sidebar,
    filter-sidebar-overlay, detail-pane, detail-pane-overlay,
    detail-pane-header, settings-pane, settings-pane-overlay,
    settings-pane-header, dashboard-enter (9 classes)

Visual regression:
  - Mobile bottom-sheet variant for detail/settings panes is gone —
    on mobile both panes now slide in from the right (DaisyUI drawer
    doesn't ship a bottom-sheet variant). Functionally equivalent,
    visually different direction.
  - Mobile drag-handle pills (::before pseudos on pane headers) are
    gone. DaisyUI doesn't include one.
  - Page-load fade-in animation removed.
  - DaisyUI drawer uses its own transform transition timing which
    may feel slightly different from the custom 0.3s ease values.

Allowlist status: custom CSS classes dropped from 18 → 9.

Verified: vite build clean (2.74s), 60/60 tests pass.

Tags: refactor, ui, daisyui, cleanup, vanilla, drawer
Complexity: 5
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-v5-migration
Semver: patch
